about.title: About
about.heading: Full Stack JS Developer looking for a permanent position
about.p1: Having worked at several Parisian startups, I've developed a strong product culture and the ability to ship fast. I enjoy both building smooth interfaces and robust backends.
about.p2: Currently finishing my degree at Epitech Paris (Software Architect), I'm looking for a permanent role where I can take on technical responsibilities and contribute to an ambitious project with a great team.
